name: Night Driver
description: Night Driver is a first-person perspective arcade racing game. The player drives a car down a winding road at night. The road is represented by simple white lines indicating the edges of the road and a center line. The objective is to drive as far as possible without crashing into the edges of the road. The game features a timer that counts down, and the player's score is based on the distance traveled before the timer runs out or the player crashes. The game features increasing difficulty, as the road's turns become sharper and more frequent as the player progresses. There are no other cars or obstacles on the road besides the road edges themselves. The player's car is always centered horizontally in the display, so the road appears to shift and rotate to simulate movement and steering. The primary challenge is maintaining control and avoiding collisions with the road edges at increasingly higher speeds.
